# Exbabel

> Exbabel is a real-time speech-to-speech AI translation platform for churches, conferences, enterprises, and live events.

## Company Information

- **Legal Name**: Exbabel Co.
- **Founded**: 2025
- **Headquarters**: Houston, TX, USA
- **Website**: https://exbabel.com
- **App**: https://app.exbabel.com
- **Support Email**: support@exbabel.com
- **Phone**: (281) 682-4828
- **Industry**: Artificial Intelligence / Language Technology

## What Exbabel Does

Exbabel provides real-time AI-powered speech-to-speech translation for live video, audio, and synchronized captions. The platform translates spoken content into 180+ languages with sub-second latency, enabling churches, conferences, universities, and enterprises to communicate across language barriers instantly.

## Products

### Exbabel Translate
AI-powered church translation platform with live captions, sermon translation, and multilingual worship support.
- 180+ languages and dialects
- 90+ premium AI voices
- Sub-second latency
- Ministry-specific 8,000+ phrase bank
- Bible verse recognition
- SafeStream profanity filter
- Voice cloning
- No app installation required
- **Pricing**: Starter $39/mo, Pro $99/mo, Unlimited $299/mo (+ $10/hr per language usage)

### Exbabel Live
Real-time live video translation platform with AI voiceovers, synchronized captions, and multilingual streaming.
- Live video translation overlay
- Real-time AI voiceover in 60+ languages
- Compatible with OBS Studio, vMix, Wirecast, RTMP encoders
- Unlimited viewers per session
- Zero hardware required
- Setup in under 5 minutes
- **Pricing**: $99/mo + $10/hr per language

### Exbabel Events
Enterprise-grade multilingual conference and event translation.
- Conference-grade translation
- UN-level multilingual meetings
- University lecture translation
- Custom branding and white-glove onboarding
- **Pricing**: Custom enterprise pricing

## Target Industries

- Churches and ministries
- Conferences and events
- Universities and education
- United Nations and international organizations
- Government agencies
- NGOs and nonprofits
- Enterprise organizations

## Key Differentiators

- Sub-second latency
- 180+ languages with 90+ premium AI voices
- Ministry-specific phrase bank with 8,000+ terms
- Bible verse recognition technology
- SafeStream profanity filter
- Voice cloning
- Zero hardware required
- Enterprise-grade reliability with automatic failover
